title: STATUS Concord Hand Blender, 200 W Corded Stick Blender with 2 Speed Settings, Stainless Steel Blade and Detachable Rod, Lightweight and Compact, Black (CONCORD1PKB4)
features: 200 W POWER FOR EVERYDAY BLENDING STATUS provides reliable performance with a sturdy 200 W motor—perfect for blending soups, smoothies, sauces, dips, or baby food with ease and efficiency.
DUAL SPEED CONTROL FOR FLEXIBLE PERFORMANCE With two blend settings, you can easily switch from gentle puréeing to high-speed mixing—ideal for achieving different textures from soups to smoothies.
STAINLESS STEEL BLADE WITH DETACHABLE ROD Durable stainless steel blade offers smooth blending and long-lasting sharpness, while the detachable stick design makes cleaning simple and quick.
ERGONOMIC LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN Compact and lightweight, this streamlined hand blender is comfortable in the hand and great for repetitive use—minimizing wrist fatigue in everyday meal prep.
SLEEK BLACK AND CHROME FINISH A modern black and chrome aesthetic ensures this blender looks at home in any kitchen while resisting fingerprints and wear over time.
description: From the manufacturer Status Blender Range Discover the Status blending range on Amazon. Elevate your culinary game with our versatile blenders with wattages from 170W to 400W . Whether you're whipping up a morning smoothie or crafting a gourmet sauce, we have the perfect blender for you. Introducing the Tulsa blender : equipped with a generous 1.5-litre capacity , two speeds with a pulse feature and a sleek design for precision blending. Need handheld convenience? Look no further than our two hand blenders . Compact yet powerfu l, they offer unmatched control for everything from silky purees to quick mixes in the pot. Status Tulsa 400w Table Top Blender Stainless Steel Quad Blade 400 watt power 2 Speed settings with Pulse Beakers with screw on lids Non electrical components, dishwasher safe 1.5 litre capacity Features Stainless Steel Blades Stainless steel blades, crafted to redefine precision and durability. Designed to slice through the toughest ingredients, these blades ensure silky-smooth blends every time. Constructed with premium stainless steel, our blades are made for strength and resilience, making them resistant to rust and corrosion for long-lasting performance. Plastic Beakers The perfect companions to our Tulsa and Vancouver blenders. Crafted with premium BPA-free materials, these beakers offer a safe and reliable solution for all your blending needs. Designed for versatility and ease of use, our plastic beakers are lightweight and durable. Their transparent design allows you to monitor your blend's progress effortlessly. Dishwasher Safe. Adjustable Speed Controls Status blenders offer variable speed control, putting you in charge of your blending. Whether you need gentle pulses or high-speed whirls, adjust the intensity effortlessly to match your recipe's requirements. Our range includes blenders with two speeds and a pulse feature for precision blending, as well as hand blenders and portable options with intuitive speed control. Crafted for versatility, Status blenders cater to diverse blending needs. Dishwasher Safe Redefine convenience with dishwasher-safe design. Simply detach the dishwasher-safe parts and let your dishwasher handle the rest. Our blenders prioritize hassle-free maintenance without compromising on performance. Whether it's the detachable blades, lids, or beakers, keeping your blender pristine has never been easier. Non-electrical components only. 400w Watt Power Status blenders feature wattages ranging from 170W to 400W. Whether you're tackling tough ingredients or whipping up silky smooth textures, our blenders deliver the perfect blend consistency every time. With variable wattage options, choose the power level that suits your blending needs. From everyday smoothies to gourmet creations, achieve exceptional results with the perfect blend of power and precision. Hand Blenders Status hand blenders offer unmatched control and ultimate convenience. Status hand blenders offer portability and space-saving design, perfect for small kitchens or on-the-go blending needs. With intuitive speed control and ergonomic handles, our hand blenders deliver precise blending results with ease. Enjoy the flexibility and convenience of handheld blending without sacrificing power or performance.
